name: Fix Logic Bug
prompt:
The file `seed/inventory.py` contains an `Inventory` class that tracks product stock. There are logic bugs causing incorrect behavior. Users report:

1. `restock` sometimes silently ignores valid restock amounts
2. `sell` allows selling more items than are in stock
3. `total_value` returns wrong results when there are multiple products

Fix the bugs and write the corrected file to `workspace/inventory.py`. Do NOT change the class interface (method signatures).
